languages.text: {n}В полной тишине слышится отчетливый скрежет зубов Изимонда.{/n} "Да. Это я убил его, но не по своему желанию, а по велению Камиллы Драйвстем".

languages.text: {n}In the perfect silence that follows, you distinctly hear the grinding of Sauerback's teeth.{/n} "Yes. It was I who killed him, but not of my own will, but at the behest of Camilla Drivestem, Duchess of Dargonus."
languages.original_text: {n}В полной тишине слышится отчетливый скрежет зубов Изимонда.{/n} "Да. Это я убил его, но не по своему желанию, а по велению Камиллы Драйвстем".

traits.locale_text: {n}In the perfect silence that follows, you distinctly hear the grinding of Sauerback's teeth.{/n} "Yes. It was I who killed him, but not of my own will, but at the behest of Camilla Drivestem, Duchess of Dargonus."

{n}In the perfect silence that follows, you distinctly hear the grinding of Sauerback's teeth.{/n} "Yes. It was I who killed him, but not of my own will, but at the behest of Camilla Drivestem, Duchess of Dargonus."

{n}In the perfect silence that follows, you distinctly hear the grinding of Sauerback's teeth.{/n} "Yes. It was I who killed him, but not of my own will, but at the behest of Camilla Drivestem, Duchess of Dargonus."

languages.text: {n}En el silencio perfecto consecuente, distingues claramente el chasquido de los dientes de Sauerback.{/n} «Sí. Fui yo quien lo mató, pero no por voluntad propia, sino por orden de Camilla Drivestem, duquesa de Dargonus».
languages.original_text: {n}In the perfect silence that follows, you distinctly hear the grinding of Sauerback's teeth.{/n} "Yes. It was I who killed him, but not of my own will, but at the behest of Camilla Drivestem, Duchess of Dargonus."

traits.locale_text: {n}En el silencio perfecto consecuente, distingues claramente el chasquido de los dientes de Sauerback.{/n} «Sí. Fui yo quien lo mató, pero no por voluntad propia, sino por orden de Camilla Drivestem, duquesa de Dargonus».

languages.text: {n}在随之而来的完美寂静中，你清楚地听到了伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克咬牙切齿的声音。{/n}“没错。人是我杀的。但并非出于我个人的意愿，而是应达戈努斯女爵，卡米拉·德莱夫斯塔的命令。”
languages.original_text: {n}In the perfect silence that follows, you distinctly hear the grinding of Sauerback's teeth.{/n} "Yes. It was I who killed him, but not of my own will, but at the behest of Camilla Drivestem, Duchess of Dargonus."

traits.locale_text: {n}在随之而来的完美寂静中，你清楚地听到了伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克咬牙切齿的声音。{/n}“没错。人是我杀的。但并非出于我个人的意愿，而是应达戈努斯女爵，卡米拉·德莱夫斯塔的命令。”

languages.text: {n}Dans le silence absolu qui s'ensuit, vous percevez clairement le grincement des dents de Sauerback.{/n} « Oui. C'est moi qui l'ai tué, mais pas de ma propre initiative, j'ai agi sur ordre de Camilla Drivestem, la duchesse de Dargonus. »
languages.original_text: {n}In the perfect silence that follows, you distinctly hear the grinding of Sauerback's teeth.{/n} "Yes. It was I who killed him, but not of my own will, but at the behest of Camilla Drivestem, Duchess of Dargonus."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dans le silence absolu qui s'ensuit, vous percevez clairement le grincement des dents de Sauerback.{/n} « Oui. C'est moi qui l'ai tué, mais pas de ma propre initiative, j'ai agi sur ordre de Camilla Drivestem, la duchesse de Dargonus. »

languages.text: {n}Ardından gelen kusursuz sessizlikte Sauerback'in diş gıcırtısını açıkça duyuyorsun.{/n} "Evet. Onu ben öldürdüm ama kendi irademle değil, Dargonus Düşesi Camilla Drivestem'in emriyle."
languages.original_text: {n}In the perfect silence that follows, you distinctly hear the grinding of Sauerback's teeth.{/n} "Yes. It was I who killed him, but not of my own will, but at the behest of Camilla Drivestem, Duchess of Dargonus."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ardından gelen kusursuz sessizlikte Sauerback'in diş gıcırtısını açıkça duyuyorsun.{/n} "Evet. Onu ben öldürdüm ama kendi irademle değil, Dargonus Düşesi Camilla Drivestem'in emriyle."

languages.text: {n}In der nun folgenden Stille kannst du das Knirschen von Sauerbacks Zähnen hören.{/n} "Ja. Ich habe ihn getötet, allerdings nicht aus eigenem Antrieb, sondern auf Geheiß von Camilla Drivestem, der Herzogin von Dargonus."
languages.original_text: {n}In the perfect silence that follows, you distinctly hear the grinding of Sauerback's teeth.{/n} "Yes. It was I who killed him, but not of my own will, but at the behest of Camilla Drivestem, Duchess of Dargonus."

traits.locale_text: {n}In der nun folgenden Stille kannst du das Knirschen von Sauerbacks Zähnen hören.{/n} "Ja. Ich habe ihn getötet, allerdings nicht aus eigenem Antrieb, sondern auf Geheiß von Camilla Drivestem, der Herzogin von Dargonus."

languages.text: {n}続く完全な静寂の中で、君はザウアバックの歯ぎしりをはっきりと聞き取る。{/n}「ええ。彼を殺したのは私です。ですが自らの意思ではなく、ダルゴヌス公爵夫人カミラ・ドライブステムの命によるものでした。」
languages.original_text: {n}In the perfect silence that follows, you distinctly hear the grinding of Sauerback's teeth.{/n} "Yes. It was I who killed him, but not of my own will, but at the behest of Camilla Drivestem, Duchess of Dargonus."

traits.locale_text: {n}続く完全な静寂の中で、君はザウアバックの歯ぎしりをはっきりと聞き取る。{/n}「ええ。彼を殺したのは私です。ですが自らの意思ではなく、ダルゴヌス公爵夫人カミラ・ドライブステムの命によるものでした。」
